overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a medieval castle interior with stone walls, wooden beams, and warm candlelight. The character navigates through rooms and climbs ladders between levels in a torch-lit fortress environment.

wooden table with lit candles and glass bottles
red fabric banner with golden heraldic emblem
wooden shelving unit against stone wall
wooden ladder leaning against stone wall leading upward

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands in a ground floor stone room illuminated by candlelight. A wooden table with candles sits in the center while red banners hang on the stone walls. The camera circles around to show the character's face before he continues exploring the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper storage room with wooden plank walls

events.description: character begins climbing wooden ladder to upper level
character reaches top of ladder and enters upper room with wooden walls

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden ladder and entering upper storage room

entered.detail: vertical wooden plank walls with warm amber lighting
red shield with golden lion emblem mounted on wooden wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt climbs the wooden ladder to an upper level, transitioning from stone walls to a room with wooden plank walls. Red heraldic shields and wooden barrels furnish this upper storage area as warm light illuminates the space.

events.description: character begins climbing second ladder in narrow stone shaft

agents.ego_description: climbing second wooden ladder through narrow stone shaft

entered.detail: wooden ladder in narrow vertical shaft
rough stone walls of narrow ladder shaft

segments.scene_description: After briefly exploring the upper room, Geralt approaches a second ladder and begins climbing through a narrow stone shaft with dim lighting, leaving the wooden-paneled room behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle great hall with armor displays

events.description: character emerges from ladder shaft into large great hall with multiple doorways

agents.ego_description: walking through great hall examining armor stands and banners

entered.detail: suit of medieval plate armor on wooden display stand
multiple wooden doorways in stone walls leading to other rooms
multiple red banners with heraldic emblems hanging from walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the ladder shaft into a spacious castle great hall with wooden floors and high ceilings. Suits of armor stand on display while red banners hang between stone doorways, and torchlight flickers against the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval fortress, transitioning from a candlelit ground floor to a grand, torch-lit great hall. It begins in a stone room where the camera circles Geralt beside a candle-topped table and red banners before he ascends a wooden ladder. As he climbs, the environment shifts from stone to an upper storage area characterized by wooden plank walls, heraldic shields, and barrels. The scene then narrows as Geralt leaves the wooden room behind to climb through a dim, stone shaft, moving upward through the architecture. Finally, the camera emerges from the shaft into a spacious great hall with high ceilings and wooden floors, where suits of armor and flickering torches line the stone doorways.
